g.onclick: sendPrompt('Give me an overview of the MedChat pipeline')
sendPrompt('What oncology PDFs are in the MedChat knowledge base?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat handle patient reports?')
sendPrompt('What graph entities does MedChat use?')
sendPrompt('What does the MedChat preprocessing engine do?')
g.text: Unicode fix · ligature repair · word stitching · header removal · reference cut

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MedChat chunk text for retrieval?')
g.text: Markdown headers → RecursiveCharacter split · size=1000 · overlap=150 · min=120

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which embedding model does MedChat use and why?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the medical_reviews collection?')
sendPrompt('What will the patient_records collection store?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat classify user query intent?')
sendPrompt('How does the MedChat hybrid retrieval engine work?')
g.text: Dense BGE + BM25 → RRF fusion → MMR reranking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('When does MedChat trigger DuckDuckGo web fallback?')
sendPrompt('Which LLM does MedChat use for generation?')
g.text: Groq · Llama 3.3 70B · context-grounded · hallucination-reduced · medical disclaimer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What features does the MedChat Streamlit interface have?')
sendPrompt('What is the Journey Summary use case in MedChat?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat explain clinical reports?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat support treatment tracking?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat answer symptom questions?')
sendPrompt('What does the Whats Next use case do in MedChat?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat clarify cancer staging?')
sendPrompt('How does MedChat render inline images in answers?')
